type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Previous reports proportionally adjusted older emission measurements (from 1993) based on hours of operation and taking into account capacity changes since 1993.
For this report a recent stack test result (2015) is used,  that accounted for most emission, in addition to EPA emission factor for sources not covered by stack test.

comments.comment: The facility has reported 25 kg of lead released from roadways in the past.  This was mistakenly reported in 2007 and 2008 as VKT is less than 10,000km.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment:
The amount of acid disposed is dependent on how well acid is captured and stored when batteries are broken. It also depends on the type of batteries processed (flooded or gel type).
Although total amount of batteries could be higher it does not necessarily lead to higher volume of acid disposed for above mentioned reasons.
Recycled amount is dependent on demand for acid for reuse by clients that take byproduct acid from Terrapure BR.
